title: Moroccan Chicken
description: A flavorful and aromatic dish from Morocco, featuring marinated chicken baked to perfection.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, Moroccan spice blend, honey, lemon juice, garlic, and preserved lemon.
Add the chicken breasts to the marinade and toss to coat. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Remove the chicken from the marinade and place on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Brush the chicken with the marinade and bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the chicken reaches an internal temperature of 165°F (74°C).
Let the chicken rest for 5 minutes before slicing and serving.
